title: Lahanas Moussaka
description: A vegetarian take on the classic Greek dish, featuring layered eggplant and a rich tomato sauce.
instructions: Brush both sides of the eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Layer half of the eggplant slices in a baking dish.
Spread half of the tomato sauce over the eggplant.
Sprinkle with half of the feta cheese.
Repeat the layers: eggplant, tomato sauce, and feta cheese.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender and the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
